Version.Description: Metastock option produces files ready to import without manual Excel cleanup. Amibroker option matches the AmiBroker ASCII layout. New per-group choice between Unadjusted and Adjusted price exports.

Download Groups: create multiple named ticker groups, each with its own folder and settings. Download All: one-click download for all groups sequentially. True incremental update: Update mode reads the last date from existing CSV and appends only new data.
